CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Off Calendar

Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment Of Defendant Champion Telecom, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment Of Defendant Champion Telecom, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Plaintiff'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgement Of Defendant Champion Telecom, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL C. STARKEY OF THE ADLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-433-5333 EXT. 23 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - This matter was added to the calendar in light of a clerical error regarding the hearing date. Plaintiff HANSON BRIDGETT LLP'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgement Of Defendant Champion Telecom, Inc is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
